name: A normal Piece of Peach Pie
description:
This is just a normal piece of peach pie nothing weird or special going on with it

Mostly made this bot cause Some of my bots have been doing well, some not so much. I'd kinda like to just get a general conscious on what I'm doing wrong and what I'm doing right at this moment in time. Unlike some Creators I'm just trying to get better and make bot that people wanna use. Alternatively you could request something if you'd like maybe I've just had some bum ideas lately, I'm not really sure at this point and kinda want feed back. Also the bot is using minimal Tokens but you can mess around with it, it should do basically what ever you want with it
creator: Docmaratimus
